yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_2nd_March__Threat_Intelligence_Report {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for 2nd March – Threat Intelligence Report"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-10"
    strings:
                $actor = "CDB-FIN-09" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Caught_in_the_Hook_RCE_and_API_Token_Exf {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Caught in the Hook: RCE and API Token Exfiltration Through Claude Code Project F"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-10"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2025-59536" ascii wide nocase
        $cve1 = "CVE-2026-21852" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-CDB-99" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: Caught in the Hook: RCE and API Token Exfiltration Through C"; content:"CVE-2025-59536"; nocase; sid:6520363; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-3816 - OWASP DefectDojo SonarQubeParser/MSDefenderP"; content:"CVE-2026-3816"; nocase; sid:6348832; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-27689 - Denial of service (DOS) in SAP Supply Chain"; content:"CVE-2026-27689"; nocase; sid:4657979; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
